name: Quick Beef Minestrone
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef in a soup pot until it is well browned.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Stir in the frozen Italian vegetables, undiluted condensed tomato soup, and water.
4. Add the dried basil and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
5. Simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Stir in the shredded cabbage and uncooked elbow macaroni.
7. Cook until all ingredients are tender.
8. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
SERVES 6.
